name: Conch Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the conch and cut into small pieces.
2. In a large bowl, mix together all ingredients except lettuce.
3. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
4. Serve on top of crisp lettuce leaves.
5. Enjoy with hot rolls and beer.
This is similar to Conch Cerviche served in the Yucatan.
